phrases.intent_en: Ask where the baggage claim for flight is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde puedo recoger el equipaje de mi vuelo?
phrases.pronunciation: Dees-KOOL-peh, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh rreh-koh-HEHR el eh-kee-PAH-heh deh mee BWEH-loh?

likely_response.local: Planta baja, siga las señales verdes.
likely_response.pronunciation: PLAHN-tah BAH-hah SEE-gah LAHS seh-NYAH-lehs BEHR-dehs
likely_response.translation_en: Ground floor, follow the green signs.

responses.english: Ground floor, follow the green signs.
responses.phonetic: PLAHN-tah BAH-hah SEE-gah LAHS seh-NYAH-lehs BEHR-dehs
responses.french: Planta baja, siga las señales verdes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the bus to city center
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde está la parada del autobús al centro?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, DOHN-deh ehs-TAH lah pah-RAH-dah dehl ow-toh-BOOS ahl SEHN-troh?

likely_response.local: Salga por puerta 4, parada 3 frente a
likely_response.pronunciation: SAHL-gah POHR poo-EHR-tah pah-RAH-dah FREHN-teh AH
likely_response.translation_en: Outside the terminal, stop number three.

responses.english: Outside the terminal, stop number three.
responses.phonetic: SAHL-gah POHR poo-EHR-tah pah-RAH-dah FREHN-teh AH
responses.french: Salga por puerta 4, parada 3 frente a

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the car rental desks are located
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde se encuentran los mostradores de alquiler de coches?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh seh en-KWEN-trahn lohs mos-trah-DO-res deh ahl-KWEH-ler deh KOH-ches?

likely_response.local: Planta baja, zona de llegadas, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: PLAHN-tah BAH-hah THOH-nah DEH yeh-GAH-dahs AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: Ground floor, arrivals area, on the left.

responses.english: Ground floor, arrivals area, on the left.
responses.phonetic: PLAHN-tah BAH-hah THOH-nah DEH yeh-GAH-dahs AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Planta baja, zona de llegadas, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the luggage storage lockers are
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo encontrar la consigna de equipaje?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh PWEH-doh ehn-kohn-TRAHR lah kohn-SEEN-yah deh eh-kee-PAH-heh?

likely_response.local: En llegadas, planta baja, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN yeh-GAH-dahs PLAHN-tah BAH-hah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At arrivals, ground floor, on the right.

responses.english: At arrivals, ground floor, on the right.
responses.phonetic: EHN yeh-GAH-dahs PLAHN-tah BAH-hah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: En llegadas, planta baja, a la derecha.
